'''2-ROB''' was the [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]] aboard [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi's]] personal [[Starship/Legends|starship]]. Her [[Memory bank/Legends|databanks]] contained data on over 12 million [[Species/Legends|species]]. She accompanied Ki-Adi-Mundi when he attempted to rescue his [[Parent/Legends|daughter]], [[Sylvn (Cerean)|Sylvn]], from the criminal [[Ephant Mon/Legends|Ephant Mon]].<ref name="InsidersGuide" />

{{Droid-stub}}
